question: Among all repositories that do not use any programming language whose name (case-insensitively) includes the substring "python," what is the proportion of files whose paths include "readme.md" and whose contents contain the phrase "Copyright (c)"?
temp_SQL: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT f."repo_name") AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) AS "proportion" FROM "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_FILES" f JOIN "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_CONTENTS" c ON f."id" = c."id" WHERE f."path" ILIKE '%readme.md%' AND c."content" ILIKE '%Copyright (c)%';
final_SQL: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT f."repo_name") AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) AS "proportion" FROM "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_FILES" f JOIN "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_CONTENTS" c ON f."id" = c."id" WHERE f."path" ILIKE '%readme.md%' AND c."content" ILIKE '%Copyright (c)%';
